item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
zip ties.. is there anything they CAN'T do??
oof
why did it have to be so wide
why is he looking in the Es and Fs
dog wants to help
that's off putting
aren't we all
always wanted one
i swear by this stuff
imagine the possibilities
mmm hmm
wonder if it's at a lobster restaurant
i guess
sounds like witchcraft
this always happens
that's kind of harsh
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Trump's new Defense Secretary.
item.description:
Not a good sign. "I've got Deus Vult – God Wills It – which was the cry of the Crusaders, on my bicep... My entire pec is a Jerusalem cross. Israel, Christianity, and my faith are things I care deeply about." - Hegseth “My orders were revoked to guard the Biden inauguration. Jerusalem Cross tattoo, which is just a Christian symbol. This is the one, this right here is what got be disinvited. I never had orders revoked before.” - Hegseth “Listen, it’s a standard deal. You remember after January 6th everyone was in Washington D.C., like Nancy Pelosi had the parking garages full of National Guardsmen. My commander called me tepidly a day before and said, ‘Major, you can just stand down. We don’t need you. We’re good.’”- Hegseth Quotes: https://www.sportskeeda.com/pop-culture/what-deus-vult-mean-pete-hegseth-tattoo-controversy-explored-wake-nomination-trump-s-defense-secretary
Source: Wikipedia "Deus Vult" https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Deus_vult
item.dc:creator: Mehlbox

By Japversus on twitter
By @TioSokaro
By @mixuen_chan
Don't look at them.
EDIT: Thank thee, Imgurians, for helping to the voyage to the Front Page! May Emperor Bless thy week! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Thighhigh thursday! Plus update
item.description: Edit- Omg really?! Most viral?! Thankyouuuu! This made my day, and I'm glad it made most of yours. Xx enjoy Hi! Thankyou to all of you who have checked up on my posts wondering if I am doing well. It's been heartwarming to know there are kind ppl who care. I have been having physical and mental issues as a result from chemotherapy and post trauma- but I am being supported and making small progress. And although I'm still having maintenance treatment, so far my scans say I'm still in the clear. I'm only one year into my remission- usually it takes five full years of clear scans to be labelled true remission. But so far so good. It's an everyday battle and I'm thankful for you all who have made me smile- either with posts or comments. Thankyou! Keep being awesome!
item.dc:creator: WitchyVixen

item.title: Memes and things vol 134
item.description:
My partner and I stand together and look at Nubbin all the time!
I send this to my D&D group whenever it’s game day.
This virus gonna make me act up
We used old Smucker’s glasses growing up.
Pffffttttt
Facts.
See you, space cowboy.
The midnight corn.
I’d love this Barbie if it were real
Nubbin putting his b-hole right on the new body pillow!

item.title: Kraftwerk plays before a confused audience for the first time (1970) ( sound on )
item.description: "Wir fahren, fahren, fahren auf der Autobahn" it isn't.... This is one of the earliest existing concert videos documenting the birth of electronic music.
